title: Introducing Business Card Scanner for monday.com!
excerpt: Transform the way you manage business cards and capture leads with our latest addition to the monday.com marketplace: Business Card Scanner! Designed to make lead capture and organization effortless, this powerful app en…

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Transform the way you manage business cards and capture leads with our latest addition to the monday.com marketplace: Business Card Scanner! Designed to make lead capture and organization effortless, this powerful app ensures that valuable contact information is never lost. Business Card Scanner uses AI to extract details from a business card photo and automatically populate your monday.com board fields with essential information such as Name, Position, Phone, E-mail, Company, Website, and Address.

Business Card Scanner1920×960 141 KB

Key Features:

AI-Powered Data Extraction: Leverage the power of AI to automatically extract details from a business card photo and populate your monday.com board fields effortlessly.

Efficient Lead Management: Turn business cards into organized and actionable leads, streamlining your lead management process.

Real-Time Scanning: Upload a photo of a business card directly from your phone’s camera. The app accurately extracts and populates contact details in real time.

Easy Setup: Installation and configuration are straightforward, making it easy for administrators and users alike to get started quickly.

Use Cases:

We built Business Card Scanner to solve the common problem of managing business cards efficiently. Traditional methods of inputting contact information are time-consuming and prone to errors. Our app streamlines this process, making it quick and accurate to convert business cards into actionable leads.

Sales Teams: Capture and manage leads quickly after networking events or trade shows by uploading business card photos directly into your monday.com sales pipeline board.

Event Organizers: Collect contact information from attendees efficiently, ensuring follow-ups and communications are organized.

Business Development: Scan business cards from meetings and conferences to ensure all potential business contacts are recorded and actionable.

Human Resources: Manage contact information from job fairs and recruitment events without losing any details.

About us:

We are Deview Studios, a proud monday.com partner committed to enhancing your monday.com experience with innovative solutions!

How to Use:

Users can easily use our app by installing it from the monday.com marketplace - Business Card Scanner. After installation, scan integrations can be configured in just a few easy steps. Simply upload a photo of a business card from your phone’s camera to the designated column in your board or through a form, and let the app do the rest.

Dependencies:

Business Card Scanner does not have any dependencies and seamlessly integrates with your existing monday.com account, regardless of your subscription tier.
